register.placeholderUsername: What would you like to be called?
register.success: Account created! Check your email and confirm your address, then sign in.

forgot.intro: Enter your email address. You will receive a link to set a new password.
forgot.success: If this email address is known, you will receive a reset link. Also check your spam folder.

error.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email address via the email you received.
error.alreadyRegistered: This email address is already in use.
error.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
error.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
error.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 2 characters.
error.fillEmailPassword: Please fill in your email address and password.
error.fillEmail: Please fill in your email address.

confirm.loadingMsg: Please wait, your email address is being confirmed.
confirm.successMsg: Your account is active. You will be redirected to the home page…
confirm.errorDefault: Something went wrong. Please try registering again.
confirm.invalidLink: Invalid confirmation link. Please check that you opened the full link.

reset.heading: Set new password
reset.subtitle: Choose a new password of at least 6 characters.
reset.success: Password saved! You will be redirected…
reset.invalidLink: This reset link is invalid or expired. Request a new link via the login page.
